post.content: How long does it typically take to receive results after completing two rounds of interviews for an SDE 1 position at Uber?
Have you received your result? As uber takes all the rounds in one day only, including the HM round.
Has your next round with the hiring manager happened?

Could you please share your interview experience? I\u2019m currently in my 3rd year and preparing for the Uber Software Engineer I role. It would be really helpful if you could share your interview experience and the key topics I should focus on for preparation.
